description: Global agent runtime configuration. Skill catalog (per-skill metadata) lives in each flow's node data. See skaileup-shared/contracts/flows.md.

standalone_mode.description: When a skill is invoked directly without a flow, it checks its own requires[] gates, runs, then suggests next steps using the orchestrator.

grounding.description: Research mode runs in parallel with any pipeline step. Each skill node declares its own grounding_folder. Cross-cutting research goes to _grounding/general/.

standards.description: Standards discovery mode runs in parallel for existing codebases. Skills check _standards/ via the inject skill before making decisions.
